title: Keto Parsnip Fries
description: A delicious low-carb twist on traditional fries, made with parsnips and perfect for a keto diet.
instructions: Preheat oil in a deep frying pan to 180°C (350°F)
Slice parsnips into long, thin strips
Pat dry parsnip strips with paper towels to remove excess moisture
Carefully add parsnip strips to the hot oil in batches
Fry for 3-4 minutes, or until golden brown and crispy
Remove from oil with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels
Season with salt and black pepper to taste
